_comment: Skeleton flow definition. Build the flow once in the FileFlows UI per AV1-VMAF-Pipeline.md, then re-export it over this file. The shape of FileFlows flow JSON varies between FF versions, so a hand-written file is unlikely to import cleanly — this skeleton exists so that once you do export, the diff stays minimal.
Name: AV1 VMAF Pipeline
Description: 4K HEVC → AV1 NVENC re-encode with libvmaf_cuda quality gate
